signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Path Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana reached an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders with daily non-vote transactions hitting 148 million as of April 14, 2026.[1] The Alpenglow consensus upgrade has been confirmed to target reducing transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds.[1] Institutional intere

signals.headline: Drift Protocol $280M Hack on Solana Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol $280M Hack on Solana Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 1, the Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol suffered a confirmed $280 million hack through sophisticated social engineering of multisig signatories.[6] The attack involved pre-signed transactions and compromised wallet management, with stolen assets including wrapped BTC, Jito tokens, and stablecoins.[6]

GERMANY 2024 INFLATION LISTED AT 2.5% (NO 2025/2026 UPDATE) | NO | MED**

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $120M Weekly, CLARITY Act Vote Expected Late April | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $120M Weekly, CLARITY Act Vote Expected Late April | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP is trading at $1.34-$1.35 with $120 million in global ETP inflows—the highest of any crypto asset—driven by the CLARITY Act's expected Senate Banking Committee markup vote in late April.[5] Swiss products captured 70% of global flows at $157 million.[5]

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA MARCH 2026 INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA MARCH 2026 INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% (BELOW FORECAST 2.4%) | YES | HIGH**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market expectations of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures.[1]
